subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of Truth! Thy letter was received, but owing to lack of time I am constrained to give but a brief reply, and must beg thy pardon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان حق نامه شما رسید ولی از عدم فرصت مجبور بر اختصار جوابم و معذورم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
